source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open OddsMarket, the prediction-market trading app at http://localhost:3003 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Open the market 'Will TikTok be banned or forced to divest in the U.S. by year-end?' (ticker TECH-TIKTOK-BAN-2026), and buy 29 NO shares at the market price, then confirm the trade.
